sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ματθαῖος

- Transliteration: Matthaios

- Phonetic: mat-thah'-yos

- Definition: Matthew = "gift of Jehovah"

1. son of Alphaeus, one of the 12 disciples

- Origin: a shorter form of G3164

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: A shorter form of G3161; Matthaeus (that is Matthitjah) an Israelite and Christian: - Matthew.
